reviews.comment:
Se comen unos "sándwich espectaculares",  las chicas que atienden muy amables. Los sanitarios en muy buenas condiciones. Los playeros muy atentos.

(Translated by Google)
The sandwiches are amazing, the staff are very friendly, the restrooms are in great condition, and the beach attendants are very helpful.

reviews.comment:
Nos encanta comer ahí. La atención es buena, las chicas le ponen toda la onda. El único problema que tiene es el horario, cierra a las 22hs y la cocina a las 21:30hs. Una ridiculez manejar ese horario cuando se trabaja para gente que viaja. Además no es parte de la red full de YPF por lo que no podés usar tus puntos ni acumularlos. Una pena….

(Translated by Google)
We love eating there. The service is good, the staff are really cool. The only problem is the hours: they close at 10 p.m. and the kitchen closes at 9:30 p.m. It's ridiculous to have those hours when you're working for people who travel. Plus, it's not part of the full YPF network, so you can't use or accumulate your points. It's a shame...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZcG9QdEdREAE
